rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Potential Gamarue DLL Filename (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Gamarue DLL Filename (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 62989cd5-4d35-4ce8-a1fd-73673c25d0f4
status: experimental
description: Detects Gamarue DLL filename in command line strings. Part of the RedCanary
  2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/gamarue/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1055.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    CommandLine|re: \S{10,70}\.\S{10,70},\w{16}
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
